zh.Llys Y, Flintshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯福林爾利斯 Y 可德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca於1022年出生在威爾士福林爾吉爾凱時，她的父親Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor , Lord of Maelors and Oswestry89歲，母親Angharad ferch Iago of North Wales24歲。她和Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1070年在英國威爾斯福林爾利斯 Y 可德享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca于1022年出生在威尔士福林爾吉爾凱时，她的父亲Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor , Lord of Maelors and Oswestry89岁，母亲Angharad ferch Iago of North Wales24岁。她和Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1070年在英国威尔斯福林爾利斯 Y 可德享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Gwerfyl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name composed of gwair ‘bend, ring, circle’ + the mutated form of mul ‘shy, modest’.

variants.name: Gweirful
meanings: Traditional name composed of gwair ‘bend, ring, circle’ + the mutated form of mul ‘shy, modest’.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca was born in 1022, in Cilcain, Flintshire, Wales, her father, Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor , Lord of Maelors and Oswestry, was 89 and her mother, Angharad ferch Iago of North Wales, was 24. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl. She died in 1070, in Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca est née en 1022, à Cilcain, Flintshire, Galles, son père, Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor , Lord of Maelors and Oswestry, avait 89 ans et sa mère, Angharad ferch Iago of North Wales, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl. Elle est décédée en 1070, à Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

Sie hatte mit Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1070 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwerfyl ferch Lluddoccaが1022年にウェールズフリントシュアイアシルケインで生まれた時，父Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor , Lord of Maelors and Oswestryは89歳，母Angharad ferch Iago of North Walesは24歳であった。彼女はEdnywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeinglとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1070年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアリス イ コエドで48歳で死去した。

ko.Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Wales: 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르 리스 와이 코드
ko.Llys Y, Flintshire, Wales: 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르 리스 와이 코드
ko.lifeSummary: Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca(이)가 1022년 웨일스 플린츠히르 시카인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor , Lord of Maelors and Oswestry(은)는 89세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Angharad ferch Iago of North Wales(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1070년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르 리스 와이 코드에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl. Ela faleceu em 1070, em Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 48 anos.

ru.Llys Y, Flintshire, Wales: ллиз и коед, флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca родилась в 1022 г. в местности силкеин, флинцхир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor , Lord of Maelors and Oswestry было 89 лет, а матери, которую звали Angharad ferch Iago of North Wales, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl. Она умерла в 1070 г. в местности ллиз и коед, флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.
